services.title: International Development Consulting
services.description: We support sustainable development in developing countries.
services.details: Drawing on extensive experience in evaluation and monitoring of ODA projects, urban development and waste management policies, and rural and community development, we design and implement practical projects that meet the needs of both donors and local communities.

services.title: Research & Studies
services.description: We conduct specialized research that contributes to policy recommendations and decision-making.
services.details: With expertise in urban development, waste management policies, and the energy sector, we provide insights for sustainable development based on field surveys and data analysis.

services.title: Education & Human Resource Development
services.description: We support the development of global talent active on the frontlines of international cooperation.
services.details: We provide practical education in SDGs education, international cooperation personnel training, and evaluation and monitoring workshops to develop highly specialized professionals.
